title: <div>  •  Creates immersion by treating each week like an unfolding narrative.</
content:
• Creates immersion by treating each week like an unfolding narrative.
• Encourages students to engage with material as part of a living, breathing world.
• Ties classroom discussions to the creative and analytical processes of storytelling.

📜 2. Writing Tips & “Did You Know?” Facts

📜 Two small, structured sections per week for quick insights.
✔ “Did You Know?” (Literary trivia, language facts, or historical tidbits).
✔ “Sharpen Your Craft” (Tiny actionable writing tips).

Example: Week 3 – The Birth of the Novel

📜 “Did You Know?”
• “Miguel de Cervantes wrote Don Quixote in prison, proving that even confinement can be the birthplace of literary genius.”

📜 “Sharpen Your Craft”
• “When describing a setting, engage all five senses. Don’t just tell me it was raining—make me hear the raindrops tapping on a tin roof.”
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 127 (chunk 127/555)
